rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF DEBORAH ANN BOLTON
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
rulings.Rulings: continued to april 17, 2019 for new notice of the Notice of Administration of Estate, which still did not indicate that the petition seeks admission of a lost will. please note, the Notice of Hearing form for the amended petition is on the wrong Judicial Council form and does not cure the issue with the Notice of Administration. new deadline for filing the POS of the proper Notice of Administration form is noon on wednesday, april 10, 2019. also no later than noon on april 10, 2019, counsel must file and provide a courtesy copy to the examiner in Room 202 of a memorandum of points and authorities in support of his argument re the effectiveness of the disclaimers as to the passage of interests under probate code section 282.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE GLORIA N. CARY DTD 4/26/93 LIVING TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition:1.To Combine Substantially Similar Trust & Determine The Validity Of Trust 2.To Transfer Trust Assets To Beneficiary Carolyn Blackburn 3.To
rulings.Rulings: continued to april 22, 2019 for new notice. 30 days notice is required and notice for the hearing on 3/10/19 was mailed 2/20/19, which was only 28 days. the amended POS of the new NOH must be filed no later than 4/15/19 in order to avoid an automatic continuance. if notice is proper, appearance will be required on 4/22/19 to address the relief requested, as the property at issue is already titled in the name of the trust, the Court cannot admit a will to probate in a trust proceeding, and it is not clear why a court order is required for the trustee to take actions allowed by the trust instrument.
